title: Farmers Markets - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Food > Farmers Markets 7 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Food Stamps/SNAP Recipients mers Markets Food Stamps/SNAP Recipients Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ANTFARM MOUNT HOOD FARMERS MARKET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a farmers market. 38600 Proctor Boulevard Sandy, OR 97055 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Friday 2pm-7pm, May-October Email (503) 482-9358 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FARMERS MARKET FUND FARMERS MARKETS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Farmers Markets offer farm fresh locally produced fruits, vegetables, meats, fish, dairy, herbs, flowers, food, and craft items. Markets accept SNAP benefits for food items. Website Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Days and hours vary by market Email (503) 208-4495 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FARMERS MARKET FUND DOUBLE UP FOOD BUCKS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Allows people to double SNAP dollars to spend on fresh produce at participating farmers markets, CSAs (community-supported agriculture), farm stands, and grocery stores. Website Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: SNAP recipients Hours: Varies Email (503) 208-4495 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FARMERS MARKET FUND PRODUCE MATCH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF If a person receives cash benefits on their Oregon Trail card rather than SNAP (food) benefits, they are eligible to participate in the Produce Match program. This program allows people to double SNAP cash dollars to spend on fresh produce at participating farmers markets. Website Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: EBT Cash recipients Hours: Varies Email (503) 208-4495 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON FARMERS MARKETS ASSOCIATION OREGON FARMERS MARKETS LOCATOR TOOL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps locate farmers markets where shoppers can find fresh produce, meat, dairy, eggs, baked goods, pantry staples, beverages, ready-to-eat foods from local vendors, and specialty items such as body care products, flowers, and live plants. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by site Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details PARTNERS FOR A HUNGER-FREE OREGON AND THE OREGON HUNGER TASK FORCE SNAP MATCH MARKET FINDER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Website provides a map that helps to locate farmers' markets in Oregon that provide matching funds, dollar for dollar, for people who use their SNAP (food stamps). Provides the location, hours, and how much funds the market can match. Locator tool includes Double Up and markets that match independently from that program. 2900 SE Stark Street Suite 1-A Portland, OR 97214 Eligibility: SNAP recipients Hours: Varies by site Get Directions Visit Website More Details ROGUE FOOD UNITES NEIGHBORS UNITE MARKETS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a mobile farmers market and food pantry with fresh, regional organic produce, organic eggs, and natural meats. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: -Tuesday 4pm-6pm The Way Medford Family Church, 2655 S Pacific Highway, Medford, OR 97501 -Wednesday 3pm-5pm Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, 11175 Highway 62, Eagle Point, OR 97524 -Thursday 4pm-6pm Medicap Pharmacy, 49 Talent Avenue, Talent, OR 97540 Email (541) 238-5055 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SISTERS FARMERS MARKET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a farmers market with local fresh produce, meat products, artist's work, and live music in downtown Sisters. 150 North Fir Street Sisters, OR 97759 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Sunday 10am-2pm June-October Email (541) 904-0134 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WALDPORT COMMUNITY CENTER WALDPORT WEDNESDAY MARKET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a weekly farmers market with farm fresh, locally produced fruits, vegetables, meats, fish, dairy, herbs, flowers, food, and craft items. Provides support to local artists and farmers. 265 E Hemlock Street Waldport, OR 97394 Eligibility: Visitors: Unrestricted Vendors: Must grow own produce, hand craft own merchandise, bake own goods or represent a marketed brand to sell at the market Hours: Wednesdays 10am-3pm (May-September) Set up: 8am Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details ANTFARM MOUNT HOOD FARMERS MARKET FARMERS MARKET FUND FARMERS MARKETS PARTNERS FOR A HUNGER-FREE OREGON AND THE OREGON HUNGER TASK FORCE SNAP MATCH MARKET FINDER SISTERS FARMERS MARKET SISTERS FARMERS MARKET WALDPORT COMMUNITY CENTER WALDPORT WEDNESDAY MARKET
